title: SEO tools access
description:
Hi seeking help w/ the client request please.

They are have sent the notification to us and are requesting for access on their end. Can we provide access to them with the following please, they also gave steps and the ones we need to give access to.

Google Analytics G4 - Admin Access | For reference on how to add us as an admin follow the steps below
1.Go to your Google Analytics Account
2. Click Admin
3. Under Admin is User Management
4. Then add: analytics1@cjadvertising.com
**Special note: All permissions except 'Manage User' would be ideal

Google Tag Manager - Admin Access |
1. Click Admin. - In the Account column, select User Management.
2. ClickAdd. - Select Add new users.
3. Enter the Google Account: analytics1@cjadvertising.com
4. Set Account Permissions to Admin.
5. Click Invite.

Google Search Console |
1. Choose a property in Search Console.
2. Click the Settings icon. in the navigation pane.
3. Click Users & permissions.
4. Click Add user. Enter the Google Account: analytics1@cjadvertising.com

Google Business Profile |
1. Go to your Business Profile.
2. Click Menu Business Profile settings. Managers.
3. At the top left, click Add .
4. Enter analytics1@cjadvertising.com
5. Under "Access," choose Manager.
6. Click Invite.

Update: CallRail Account & DID
1. Please provide the phone number that should receive phone calls.

Thanks much!



cc

Name: Jordan M. Vogt 
Title:  Associate Attorney 

Bio:
Jordan M. Vogt is an associate personal injury attorney who brings a disciplined, analytical, and client-focused approach to injury litigation. He earned his undergraduate degree in Economics, with a minor in Political Science, from Central Connecticut State University, where he was named to the President’s List and served as captain of his high school baseball and basketball teams, developing leadership and accountability that continue to shape his legal practice.

Jordan received his Juris Doctor from the University of Connecticut School of Law, with a focus on insurance law, providing a strong foundation in personal injury claims. While at UConn Law, he participated in the Animal Law Clinic, advocating for victims of animal abuse and neglect.

Outside the office, Jordan enjoys golf, basketball, and following Manchester United. His Catholic faith informs his values of integrity, service, and respect for every client he represents.

title: GBP Phone Numbers
description:
Hey ,

I noticed a few discrepancies between Gould Injury Law’s GBP listings and the phone numbers on their website. Before reaching out to the client, can you please confirm whether we already have this information or access to any call tracking/local number details?

1. New Haven and Waterford GBPs share the same primary GBP phone number.
2. Hartford GBP uses the main number and does NOT match what is shown on the site.

Before we go to the client, I wanted to check with you:
- Can you confirm which numbers are correct for each location (New Haven, Waterbury, Hartford), and/or if we have unique numbers?
- Are there any call tracking accounts active, and do we have access to them? 

For proper attribution and NAP consistency, each GBP should have its own unique local primary number and adhere to the GBP phone number structure as outlined below.
 

Ideal GBP Phone Number Structure 

 
PRIMARY - GBP Call Tracking Number (unique to that GBP) 
- If no GBP call tracking, use local number. 
 
SECONDARY- Local Number (unique to that location) 
- Number used on citation listings 
- Number should match the phone number on site (the number associated with the NAP in the footer and/or alongside the location's map embeds, etc.) in order to correlate the website and GBP for Google. 
 
ADDITIONAL SECONDARY - Main Business Number (in this case 888-WIN-FAST)
– (optional) 


New Haven

GBP Primary - (203) 773-0817
GBP Secondary - (888) 946-3278 (Main number 888-WIN-FAST)
On Website:
Landing Page -
(203) 773-0817
(888) 946-3278

GBP Secondary - N/A

title: Reporting Call Prep
description:
Please provide by Monday, 12 PM:
  1. How is performance this month?
General performance overview:


Website is gaining more keyword rankings and traffic and it is constantly increasing for the last months, below is a graphic with the performance for the last 3 months for organic search traffic and impressions:


Search rankings in the last 3 months are slowly increasing for the top 3 positions and 4-10 positions as seen in this graphic:

2.  Campaign health status: Green / Yellow / Red

The campaign in great technical shape, we are constantly working to update any technical issues that appear:


3. Areas of concern

Areas of concern - The main area of concern is still the GBP local rankings, which are slowly increasing at the moment for all locations, and we are closely monitoring them and doing our best to support the GBPs by improving the website’s visibility.

4. Anything stand out? Wins or things we need to be aware of?

Right now we are seeing wins as the website traffic is increasing and this is good news for the GBP rankings as well, as the success of one influences the other.

5. Do you need anything from the client?

We are currently working to improve the content for the main topic of interest: Car Accident Lawyer, we would like to know if there are more topics/services the client wants to focus on.

6. What is our main focus next month?

We are focusing on creating complete topical maps to prepare content for MVA services starting with Car Accidents and continue with Motorcycle Accidents and Trucking Accidents.



How did February shape up for the firm?

GBP Activity
  • Total 5 new reviews on the GBP
  • 3 New reviews
  • 2 Reinstated reviews
Billboard Printing
  • Did you get your images from the previous photographer?
  • When is the billboard going up and where?

What tone are we setting?

Client temperature this month:
 ☐ Strong
☐ Neutral
☐ Slightly concerned
☐ Frustrated

Weekly pulse

Data Quality & Performance Rating: 3 out of 5
Why Not a 5?

  • Low CTR Overall:
    • Overall click-through rate (CTR) is just 0.26%. For reference, a healthy CTR is usually between 1–5%—so only a tiny fraction of impressions turn into traffic.
  • Position Still Needs Work:
    • While some core keywords rank in the top 3, most impressions are for keywords in positions 15–25 (page 2+), which drives down organic clicks.
  • Brand Reliance:
    • The best-performing terms are branded (“Gould Injury Law,” “Gould Injury Lawyers”), while non-brand or high-intent service terms are much weaker.
  • Long-tail/Generic Terms Underperforming:
    • Many high-volume queries (“injury lawyer”) are ranked 10+, with very few clicks despite big impression counts.
  • Opportunities Missed:
    • Some days show high impressions but single-digit clicks, indicating lost potential traffic and discoverability.
  • Inconsistency:
    • Conversion from impressions to clicks varies widely by keyword.



Brightlocal
Hartford
Waterbury
New Haven

Rank Tracker



SECTION 2: PERFORMANCE OVERVIEW (CM SECTION)


OVI will fill this out by monday.
  1. How is performance this month?
  2. Campaign health status: Green / Yellow / Red
  3. Areas of concern
  4. Anything stand out? Wins or things we need to be aware of?
  5. Do you need anything from the client?
  6. What is our main focus next month?
AM must review and confirm alignment with CM before call.

Risk Flag:
 ☐ No performance concerns
 ☐ Minor fluctuation
 ☐ Underperformance risk

If risk exists:
  • Has CM been aligned?
  • Has AM Lead been notified?
No surprises allowed on call.

SECTION 3: PERFORMANCE Q&A PREP


List anticipated performance questions:




Confirm:

☐ CM prepared for these
☐ Messaging aligned
☐ Time boundary plan set

WORK COMPLETED 


This mirrors the “Campaign Execution” portion of the call.

List in client-friendly language:
  • SEO deliverables completed:
    • Posted Content on the GBP and optimized on the website.
    • Audit Existing Content
    • We ran the website through Screaming Frog to identify optimization opportunities. Also run the site through GSC to evaluate. 
      • 403 pages - temporary error as the pages are working now
        Lins to external redirects - fixed
        No missing / too long metadata
        Thin pages - task in progress

WORK IN PROGRESS

None.

title: Include Sitemap In footer of Client websites
description:
Hi, this is inline w/ a group of tasks we have from a sheet. Here is the link for reference: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qPfUUC1J2r1s7Ot8Y1PmIcje6WpyMszDhxHGz4TxDTk/edit?gid=0#gid=0

SEO added more info column D. 

I have included the task info here:
--- 
Hey Team!

To enhance our technical SEO baseline, improve crawl efficiency, and ensure consistent signaling across all client properties, It would be great to come to an agreement to outlining a new, standardized protocol for crawl management.

My suggestion is as follows:

Implement the following three directives on all client websites as part of our standard build and maintenance process.

1. XML Sitemap in robots.txt (Primary Directive)

This is the most effective way to inform search engines of all indexable URLs.

Action: Ensure the robots.txt file for every client domain contains a Sitemap directive pointing to the full URL of the XML sitemap.

Implementation Example:
User-agent: 
Sitemap: https://www.clientdomain.com/sitemap.xml

The "Why": This provides a clear, direct path for Google to find and crawl our most important pages, ensuring faster discovery and indexing of new content.

2. User-Facing HTML Sitemap (Footer)

This is for user experience and secondary crawl pathing.

Action: All client websites must have a user-facing HTML sitemap.

Implementation: This sitemap must be linked in the footer of every page on the site.

The "Why": This provides a clear navigation path for users, improves site accessibility, and   acts as a secondary crawl path for search engines to discover deep pages.

Strategic Crawl & Indexation Control

This is critical. We must be precise in telling crawlers what to crawl and what to index.

A. To Control Crawling (Using robots.txt)

We must Disallow crawlers from accessing low-value, non-SEO pages to conserve crawl budget.

Action: Audit and update the robots.txt file to Disallow non-public or utility sections of the site.
Implementation Examples:
Disallow: /wp-admin/

The WP sitemap page  plugin in perfect to use as a plugin for now

Regarding providing a robot.txt:

They differ per client especially regarding disallows but here is a comprehensive one that can be edited according to client needs especially regarding disallows:

User-agent: *

# --- Core WordPress File Disallows ---
# Block all core administrative and include folders.
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-includes/

# --- Crawl Budget Optimization ---
# Block non-media plugin and theme files from being crawled.
Disallow: /wp-content/plugins/
Disallow: /wp-content/themes/

# Block internal search result pages, which are low-quality, duplicate content.
Disallow: /?s=
Disallow: /search/

# Block other non-public WordPress files and pages.
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /readme.html
Disallow: /trackback/
Disallow: /xmlrpc.php

# --- Allow Directives for Critical Files ---
# Explicitly ALLOW critical AJAX and asset files that Google
# may need for rendering, even if their parent folder is disallowed.
Allow: /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php
Allow: /wp-content/uploads/

# --- Sitemap Directive ---
# This is the primary directive to tell all search engines where our XML sitemap is located.
# [IMPORTANT: Replace with the client's actual sitemap URL]
Sitemap: https://www.clientdomain.com/sitemap_index.xml

Also, just an example of placement. Sitemap listed at the very bottom of the footer on the left followed by privacy policy etc.

* In the footer we will use the page /sitemap/ and not the XML sitemap.  The XML sitemap is for Google & the robots.txt.


you can use this as robots.txt:
 
User-agent: *

# --- Core WordPress File Disallows ---
# Block all core administrative and include folders.
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-includes/

# --- Crawl Budget Optimization ---
# Block non-media plugin and theme files from being crawled.
Disallow: /wp-content/plugins/
Disallow: /wp-content/themes/

# Block internal search result pages, which are low-quality, duplicate content.
Disallow: /?s=
Disallow: /search/

# Block other non-public WordPress files and pages.
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /readme.html
Disallow: /trackback/
Disallow: /xmlrpc.php

# --- Allow Directives for Critical Files ---
# Explicitly ALLOW critical AJAX and asset files that Google 
# may need for rendering, even if their parent folder is disallowed.
Allow: /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php
Allow: /wp-content/uploads/

# --- Sitemap Directive ---
# This is the primary directive to tell all search engines where our XML sitemap is located.
# [IMPORTANT: Replace with the client's actual sitemap URL]
Sitemap: https://www.goarco.com/sitemap_index.xml

title: Technical updates
description:
Hi I prepared a list with some small updates & fixes on this website, let me know how this goes, thanks.

1. Can we fix the menu to not slide into the call number section? it would be great if this was an easy fix, I thought that updating the menu item ABOUT THE FIRM to ABOUT US will make it shorter and fix the problem, but it's still the same.
2. Let's add location links in the footer for the three locations:

Waterbury - https://gouldinjurylaw.com/waterbury-personal-injury-lawyer/
New Haven - https://gouldinjurylaw.com/new-haven-personal-injury-attorney/
Hartford - https://gouldinjurylaw.com/hartford-personal-injury-lawyer/


3. The following pages have a long list of cities around the page location in the content, can we make it a widget (separate for each page because the locations are different) to display this on the right side of the page like categories and other widgets?
https://gouldinjurylaw.com/hartford-personal-injury-lawyer/
https://gouldinjurylaw.com/new-haven-personal-injury-attorney/

Example Hartford:


4. Regarding design, I am not sure who can make the call here, I discussed this with my colleagues and we think we should test another header image for the site, we think the image with the cheetah is not great for CTR, so we should do at least a split test with another picture, maybe showing the team of lawyers or something like this.

is this possible? thanks

title: Round Table - Build out and launch a lead generation site
description:
Please make a note of the following information. 
During our most recent meeting with the Gould team on Wednesday, August 21st, Corey and Bob had a discussion about launching a standalone website that would provide car crash reports. Corey presented an example that Bob approved of, which involved creating an off-brand site (separate from gouldinjurylaw.com) focused on obtaining your crash report.

Roundtable discussion: To generate leads, the goal is to have people call in to request a report about their crash. The messaging strategy could be along the lines of, "We obtain the police reports for our clients." Bob pointed out that the challenge lies in the fact that the car crash report is in Connecticut, and it takes the state police anywhere from six to 18 months to produce the report for those involved.

Questions:
  1. Is this within the team's scope?
  2. How long will it take to build the page?
  3. How much will it cost the client?

CC: please add more questions we should be asking.

 Reference

title: Website with a Spanish stand-alone site.
description:
In our last meeting with the Gould team (Wednesday, August 21st) and Bob discussed making the website multilingual with AI-powered Spanish translation.

  1. Is this within the team's scope?
  2. How long will it take to translate the website?
  3. How much will it cost the client?

CC: please add more questions we should be asking.
CC:

Reference

description:
Hi Team,

Bob wants to add language to the website that will highlight a specific term if it's trending, such as "car accident insurance attorney
Soundbite.

Can this be achieved, and what will it look like? Also, how long will this project take?

title: Add GBP Post
description:
🚗 Proving Fault in a Car Accident: How Gould Injury Law Can Help You 🚗


Car accidents can change your life in an instant, leaving you with injuries, medical bills, and lost income. To recover compensation, proving fault is essential—and it’s not always straightforward. That’s where the experienced attorneys at Gould Injury Law come in.

We understand the complexities of car accident cases and know how to build a strong argument for liability. Our team investigates every angle, gathering evidence such as police reports, witness statements, dashcam footage, and even input from accident reconstruction experts. This thorough approach helps establish fault and ensures that you receive the compensation you deserve.

We also guide you in strengthening your case by advising you to seek immediate medical attention, avoid admitting liability, and letting us handle communications with insurance companies. At Gould Injury Law, we’re committed to fast, fair, and fearless representation.

Let us help you pursue the justice and financial recovery you need to rebuild your life. 🛣️💼

#CarAccidentLawyer #ProvingFault #GouldInjuryLaw #PersonalInjuryHelp

https://gouldinjurylaw.com/proving-fault-in-a-car-accident-how-a-lawyer-can-strengthen-your-case/

900 Grand Ave #1, New Haven, CT 06511, United States

title: Add GBP Post
description:
💼 How Do Contingency Fees Work? Gould Injury Law Explains!

After an accident or injury, financial concerns can add unnecessary stress when you need to focus on recovery. At Gould Injury Law, we understand that upfront legal fees can be overwhelming, especially with medical bills and lost wages piling up. That’s why we work on a contingency fee basis – no fees unless we win your case.

With a contingency fee arrangement, you won’t pay any upfront costs. Our payment is contingent on securing a favorable outcome for you, meaning our fees come directly from your settlement or court award. This structure enables us to start working on your case immediately, giving you access to the legal support you need without delay.

Connecticut's contingency fee laws set clear guidelines, ensuring transparency and fairness for injury victims. You’ll know exactly where your money goes, and we’ll be with you every step of the way, fighting for maximum compensation.

At Gould Injury Law, we’re committed to fast, fair, and fearless representation. Contact us today for a free consultation!

#ContingencyFees #PersonalInjuryLaw #GouldInjuryLaw #NoWinNoFee

https://gouldinjurylaw.com/how-contingency-fees-work-with-personal-injury-attorneys/

900 Grand Ave #1, New Haven, CT 06511, United States

title: Add GBP Post
description:
Injured on the job in Connecticut? Understand your rights to compensation! Workplace injuries can lead to significant financial stress and physical recovery challenges. In Connecticut, workers’ compensation offers a fast way to secure medical and financial support. This no-fault system means you’re typically covered without needing to prove an employer's fault. However, certain situations, like intentional harm, retaliation, or gross negligence by your employer, could allow you to pursue a personal injury lawsuit outside workers’ comp.

If your injury stems from a defective product, toxic exposure, or a third-party contractor, additional legal options may also be available. Protect your rights by acting quickly—report your injury, seek medical attention, and file a claim. For cases beyond workers’ comp, consult an experienced attorney to explore all paths for compensation. Gould Injury Law’s dedicated team is ready to help Connecticut workers secure the support they deserve.

#WorkplaceInjury #WorkersCompensation #ConnecticutLaw #GouldInjuryLaw
#FreeConsultation

https://www.tomkileylaw.com/blog/filing-injury-claim-for-incapacitated-deceased/

900 Grand Ave #1, New Haven, CT 06511, United States

title: Add GBP Post
description:
Have you recently been in an accident and are struggling with insurance negotiations? You're not alone! In Connecticut, thousands of residents face this challenge every year. Negotiating with insurance companies can be frustrating, but you don't have to handle it on your own. Our step-by-step guide can help you navigate the process, ensuring you're prepared with strong evidence, detailed records, and proper legal support. Hiring a personal injury attorney can level the playing field and ensure you're fully compensated for your injuries and losses.

At Gould Injury Law, we know the tactics insurers use to minimize payouts, and we're here to fight for your rights. From handling communication to pushing for a fair settlement, our experienced attorneys are committed to getting you results—fast. Let us guide you through the complex insurance claim process and maximize your compensation.

Call us today to schedule a free consultation.

#PersonalInjuryLaw #ConnecticutAccidents #InjuryClaimHelp #InsuranceNegotiationTips #GouldInjuryLaw #FreeConsultation

https://gouldinjurylaw.com/how-to-handle-negotiations-with-insurance-companies-in-connecticut/

900 Grand Ave #1, New Haven, CT 06511, United States

title: Add GBP Post
description:
Have you been injured in an accident due to someone else’s negligence and are wondering if you’ll need to go to court to resolve your personal injury case? The good news is that most personal injury cases are settled out of court through negotiations with the at-fault party’s insurance company. Settling out of court can offer faster resolutions, lower costs, and more control over the outcome.

However, sometimes a trial is necessary if the settlement offer is too low or the insurance company acts in bad faith.

At Gould Injury Law, we specialize in fast settlements but are fully prepared to take your case to court if needed. Our experienced personal injury attorneys will guide you through the process, ensuring you receive the compensation you deserve. Contact us today for a free consultation!

#PersonalInjuryLaw #InjuryClaims #FastSettlements #GouldInjuryLaw #LegalHelp

https://gouldinjurylaw.com/can-your-personal-injury-case-be-settled-out-of-court/

description:
Trucking accidents often cause significant injuries due to the large size and heavy weight of commercial trucks. Our knowledgeable personal injury lawyers can greatly influence the outcome of your case. We are adept at navigating the complexities of truck accident claims, including managing multiple responsible parties and comprehending both federal and state regulations.

If you're feeling overwhelmed by all the implications of a truck accident, don't navigate the legal process alone. Seek professional help from experienced truck accident personal injury attorneys who can provide guidance and fast results during this challenging time. Also, if you have any question about your truck accident, you can find some of the answers, here: https://gouldinjurylaw.com/free-consultation-get-answers-about-your-truck-accident-case-today/

#truckaccidentattorney #GouldInjuryLaw #NewHavenCT  #freeconsultation

900 Grand Ave #1, New Haven, CT 06511, United States

title: Add GBP Post
description:
Car accidents on private property, such as parking lots, can be stressful and complex, but they are still covered under personal injury law. It's essential to consult an experienced lawyer immediately to understand your rights and pursue compensation. Common causes of these accidents include distracted driving, holiday season rush, and backing out of parking spaces. Despite the location, you have similar rights to seek compensation as on public roads. Key steps after such an accident include seeking medical attention, calling the police, staying calm, gathering evidence, and consulting a lawyer. Connecticut law allows victims to claim compensation even if partially at fault, reducing the settlement by the percentage of their responsibility. Gould Injury Law specializes in obtaining fast compensation for such incidents. Learn more: https://gouldinjurylaw.com/car-accidents-on-private-property/


#caraccidentattorney #GouldInjuryLaw #NewHavenCT  #freeconsultation

900 Grand Ave #1, New Haven, CT 06511, United States

title: Final 2 staff members for website...
description:
Terri Simmons - Case Manager


With over 10 years of plaintiff's personal injury experience, Terri has seen it all and can handle everything related to your case. As an added benefit, Terri is incredibly patient and thoughtful and within moments you'll feel like you're speaking to an old friend.   She is a lifetime New Haven resident with a large extended family that she loves spending time with.  In her free time, Terri enjoys listening to live music, singing karaoke, travelling, and being at church.  Terri's guiding philosophy is that "God is always victorious, so I stay on His side."





Caitlyn Roman - Senior Administrator


Caitlyn is a New Haven native and has been part of the Win Fast Family since 2021. She started as our Front Office Manager and, in a short time, has transformed into the role of Senior Administrator. She leverages her organizational and time management skills in order to take on and complete critical projects that help the firm get faster and better each day. Besides being a valued member of our team, in her free time Caitlyn enjoys traveling, reading, watching Beetle Juice on Broadway, and spending time with her three kittens.

title: New member of staff for the site...
description:
Litigation Case Manager

Ishel Gutierrez is a paralegal who recently joined our team. Ishel is a first generation American whose parents are from Colombia, and she is fluent in both English and Spanish.  Ishel’s proficiency in Spanish has allowed her a unique perspective into the lives of the firm’s Spanish speaking clients. Ishel is a 2013 graduate of the University of Bridgeport, where she received her Bachelor of Arts in Social Science with a concentration in Criminal Justice and has been working in the Legal Field ever since.  After starting out in criminal law and gaining experience doing Habeas work, Ishel decided to concentrate her focus on personal injury law.  Ishel is also a licensed Notary Public. In her spare time, Ishel enjoys going on hikes, eating out, and spending time with her husband, Manny and her dog, Logan.

title: New member of staff for the website...
description:
Yasmin Direnzo is a Senior Litigation Case Manager.

-----------------

Yasmin began her legal career at a commercial real estate company in New York City in 2000.  After she moved to CT in 2009, she began working in defense litigation for insurance companies and learned NY, CT, NJ, PA, and Rhode Island law and continued until 2021 when she joined The Win Fast team. She’s been a superstar since she stopped defending insurance companies and began helping our clients win against them. In her free time, Yas likes to read, travel, and spend time with her loved ones.

Please add this new settlement to the website...
description:
https://gouldinjurylaw.com/case-results/

“BEN”
Ben was loading up his car in the parking lot of a medical facility when a random attacker came at him from behind and stabbed him multiple times.  Ben suffered from two punctured lungs, a punctured liver, and had to have his spleen removed in emergency surgery.  He made a very successful recovery, however, and has no residual health issues.  We learned that there had been previous attacks in the parking lot and the medical facility failed to take proper steps to keep patients safe.  This case settled for $300,000 before a lawsuit was filed and the facility agreed to increase security in the future.

title: Add these case settlements to the website...
description:
1.       Dan was riding his motorcycle in a rural part of the state when a family’s pet sheep ran out into the road and right into the side of his bike!  Sadly the sheep was killed instantly in gruesome fashion.  Dan was launched from his bike and shattered his ankle requiring reconstructive surgery.  He missed months of work as a bus driver.  The case was settled before we had to go to court for $300,000.

 

2.      Jennie was at a kid’s birthday party at a marina clubhouse with family and friends.  When she left the clubhouse, she stepped down from the clubhouse doorway onto the ground and rolled her ankle causing it to break and require surgery.  The ground where she stepped was unpaved with loose rocks and stone right outside the door.  The marina promptly paved the parking lot and allegedly had plans to do so months before the fall.  This case settled just before trial for $177,750.

title: New Associate
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Predrag, Venus Saragena
description:
@predrag - remove New
 
Zachary I. Goldsmith handles both negotiation and litigation matters at Gould Injury Law. Zachary joined the firm after more than a decade of work in New York City. Zachary has extensive experience in civil ligation, personal injury, estate planning, administrative law, federal practice and environmental law. He also has many years of education experience in America, South Africa, Europe and Israel. Born in Ledyard, Connecticut Zachary graduated from Connecticut College in 2003 with a B.A. in Gender & Women’s Studies. After a career as a jazz musician and a chef he returned to Connecticut to pursue a career in Law graduating Quinnipiac University School of Law Cum Laude in 2010. During his time at Quinnipiac Zachary participated in, and won, Mock Trial. When not working hard for your best interests you will find Zachary playing music, riding a bicycle or spending time with his Boston Terrier and his daughter. He is currently pursuing an M.A in Holocaust Studies at Yeshiva University and is President of Infinite Possibilities, a non-profit dedicated to the proliferation and installation of public art in New London County.

title: Please add these new settlements to the website...
description:
2 new settlements
 
Craig S. – Craig was driving his work vehicle in the rain when another driver lost control, spun across the highway and smashed into him.  Craig slammed his knee against the dashboard and was immediately in pain.  After a few months of physical therapy, it became clear his knee had serious damage and he underwent an arthroscopic surgery to repair it.  All of Craig’s bills were paid and we settled his case for $100,000.
 
Rachel D. – Rachel got into a domestic dispute with her boyfriend who dragged her out of his car and threw her on the ground.  In a fit of rage, he backed out of her driveway without realizing exactly where he dropped her and ran over her leg.  Rachel’s leg was mangled and had a severe break.  After 6 surgeries she is able to walk again but her healing has taken a lot of time.  We settled this case for $1,600,000 which we structured to provide long term stability for Rachel.  The total payout after the structured settlement will exceed $2,000,000.

title: Please add this to the CASE RESULTS PAGE
description:
https://gouldinjurylaw.com/

SETTLEMENT $1,100,000

Joseph was a retired veteran but couldn’t keep himself busy enough so he took a job as a handyman at a local garage. He had been working there for a few years keeping the garage clean, moving cars around, and generally helping out with keeping the facility running smooth. One morning he was using a backpack blower to clean out one of the bays and pressed the button to close the bay door. As the steel door closed, it caught the back pack and came down on his neck gradually pushing him to the floor. Joseph was killed when the door closed entirely on him breaking his neck. The garage door failed to have a simple safety cut off that would have sensed him blocking the door, similar to what one might find in a residential garage door. That defect cost Joseph his life.

TO GO IN HERE...

title: Some more workers comp case studies...
description:
James Harris had been employed by a maintenance company for many years when one afternoon at work his back gave out on him after moving a heavy hose. After 5 months of fighting, his employer finally agreed to pay for his back surgery which was very successful. With a few months of rehabilitation, James felt much better but was forced to find a new, less physically taxing job. This Worker’s Compensation case was fully settled in under 2 years for $92,000.



Michael Mayor worked a major grocery store for many years. During that time he sustained two hernias which his doctor told him was due to him lifting and tossing frozen turkeys at work. His employer fought very aggressively arguing that hernias are not caused by trauma or lifting and occur naturally to anyone. Just before a formal hearing was to occur, the grocery store agreed to settle this claim for $60,000. This settlement was notable not just for the amount, but because hernias are incredibly difficult to classify as a work injury but also because Michael had no long term disability from his.

Hartford, CT-Slip and Fall
description:
For this site: https://gouldinjurylaw.com/about-the-firm/

Word count: 500 words

KEYWORDS--Navigate to this link to use this tool to target the keywords for this page: https://app.surferseo.com/drafts/s/CpoGoPEILnAVY8vvplNqsWH9W69lyvdV

In lieu of extensive client style notes, please note the following: 
  • He likes to be known as aggressive and fast. We can use the words fast, and faster, but not fastest. He is going to be rebranding to 888-WIN-FAST in a few years so he wants to use that liberally.
  • In fact, he likes "fast/faster" to be well-distributed throughout the content quite a bit. If your page is about 1000-1500 words and you have a count of "fast" only 6 times, you might up it to 10 times.
  • Always include "fast/faster" in the first 1-2 paragraphs of your page.
  • The current site's case page content is VERY readable--very low grade on Hemingway App. You don't have to go quite this low, but try to keep sentences uncomplicated and to use words that are easy to understand. Greatly limit your pink (and yellow) sentences. 
  • Be very relatable and down to earth in tone and style. (Review the readability guidelines in the style guide!!)
  • Put yourself in the client's shoes for this one. Notice how this page does this with imaginative imagery: https://gouldinjurylaw.com/road-accidents/. Don't go overboard with this, though. I feel like this page overdo it. But it's insight into how the firm wants to relate to their clients. Take this page for example: https://gouldinjurylaw.com/bike-accidents/. 
  • IMPORTANT--Something I find lacking (or kind of illogically organized) in our content sometimes is focusing on problems and solutions. From the top of the page or section, identify and target the problem, the pain point, that is bothering the victim for that case type. Then propose a solution and explain why the firm can provide that solution. Use this problem-solution approach to sort your content logically. 
  • As always, write in a way that will move the reader to action. I only want to highlight this so we remember that our aim to persuade the reader. This is why we must use relatable language that ANYONE will understand and relate to.

  • As always, write in a way that will move the reader to action. I only want to highlight this so we remember that our aim to persuade the reader. This is why we must use relatable language that ANYONE will understand and relate to.

title: Create and Send Proposal -
description:
,

I'm pasting part of an email I sent to Bob last November. Bob, is opting in for option 2 "$5,000 per month", SEO for his two locations, going after General PI terms first.

Bob's email address: rgould@gouldinjurylaw.com

"Currently, Google has two locations for your law firm: 
One in Hartford, and the other in New Haven. 
Does your law firm operate out of both locations?

If so, we will want to optimize both locations, but in the beginning in order to maximize budget and quickest path to lead generation, we will work on growing your website and Hartford Google My business listing. 

 Personal injury is one of the most competitive markets in Google search optimization and Google search paid advertising. However, Your market is in the medium competition scale, and does not require the budget of someone in a Boston type market. 

This means with the right focus and resources, we can get some quick ranking wins in the Personal injury keyword buckets. Keywords like: 
Hartford personal injury lawyer
personal injury lawyer hartford ct 
personal injury lawyer
injury lawyer ct
injury lawyers

Your website will need work no matter what agency helps you in your SEO journey. We will need to address the many domain names pointing to your website, and decide on a brand name to use going forward: Gould law group (website url) or Gould injury law (associated with GMB and directory sites). 

I want you to know, I'm sensitive to costs, and dont want to spend money or time on activities that dont get us towards the results we are after. Also, SEO is something you want to commit to for at least six months. Of course with us, you can cancel with a 30 day paid notice. 

With your campaign, we will spend the first month addressing your website and Google my business foundational needs. We wont get far in our ranking efforts, if our foundation is poor. Month 2, we will begin the proactive ranking efforts, which will put us in month 3-4 before we have solid page one results. This doesn't mean we won't achieve page one rankings before that, I'm trying to set proper expectations.

To keep this investment cost effective, I would recommend we focus our efforts towards Personal injury rankings, and one location first. 

Once we have solid rankings for the website and the first location, we can look to reallocate resources, towards the secondary location. 

Option 1 - For this plan, the monthly investment would be around $3,500 pm. 

Option 2 - If you want to invest into the secondary location from the start, we would need an additional $1,500 pm = $5,000pm 

(please keep these prices between us, as our single location seo campaigns start at $5k pm, we are giving you a discount because you are a client referral)

"
*** important to add in the proposal ***

Apart of our marketing campaign will be: 
  • 1st 30 days - Decision on Website - keep and optimize, take the content and add it to a new CMS (rebuild). We are rolling out with his brand name and his website: Gouldinjurylaw.com Gould Injury law. 
  • We will need to update ALL legal & review directories, as well as his social media, and optimize his Youtube channel and videos. 
  • We will need to do the same with his 2 GMB listings. 
  • Bob, made it clear that he wants his branding "888-WIN-FAST" to be front and centered in all that we do. 
  • Create a list of his directory logins, so we can share with Bob
